Sundays are all about bRUNch. This crew took to the streets and @colinary 's dining table for some festive food. #bRUNch #6RUN3 #run613 #myottawa #instarunners #runottawa #betterforit
#thepercytree making a cameo in today's bRUNch! #6run3 #runottawa #ottcityrunclub
#thepercytree and yes there was a few ❄️ on my #morningrun #lazyspring
#thepercytree bye bye ottawa, glad to see you're warming up!! see you in two weeks, if anyone wants to snag pics of this guy in progress I'd be in your debt!!!
#thepercytree so great to get out into the world, it's a gorgeous day, get out there and use both of your hands if you can! #thingsicandowithonehand ✋🙏💛✨☀️

#thepercytree - definitely channeling my inner crow right now. Two of em flew to the tree as I approached, cawed, then flew off as I passed. I think they were asking me to look from a different perspective, which isn't such a bad idea
#thepercytree from thxgivin 📷 @ellellebean also thx to @juliabueneman and Bridget for supporting that cause!!! I'll be back soon to see the metamorphosis in person myself!!!

#thepercytree --- I'm going to traveling til mid October - if anyone is nearby and feels like capturing this tree like this in a very critical change period, I'd love that!! Please tag #thepercytree and cc me, and feel free to ask for my very scientific composition steps 😉
